canonical.title: Michelin & Gault&Millau-rated tables in and around Ghent (2026)

parent.title: Standout dining in and around Ghent — 2026

siblings.title: Chef-driven & destination tables
siblings.summary: The chefs to book for in Ghent, the drive-out destinations within ~90 minutes, and the 2024–2026 openings and closures that just redrew the map.

siblings.title: Romantic & special-occasion settings
siblings.summary: Six Ghent rooms worth a big night out — from a 24-seat Michelin star in a 1671 building to candlelit canal-side warehouses.

siblings.title: Cocktail-led dining & bar-restaurants
siblings.summary: Five Ghent venues where the drinks programme is at least as serious as the food — speakeasy, hotel-bar, canal-side, rooftop, Indian sharing-plate.

siblings.title: Distinctive cuisines beyond Franco-Belgian
siblings.summary: Standout non-Franco-Belgian restaurants in Ghent: omakase, ramen, Vietnamese, Thai, Korean, Pakistani, Syrian-Lebanese, Moroccan, Spanish, Turkish.

siblings.title: Remarkable locations & rooms
siblings.summary: Five Ghent venues where the room is the reason: a 15th-century butchers' hall, a converted Franciscan church, a restored 1880s warehouse, a tiled former butcher shop, and the city's two real rooftops.

siblings.title: Review & rating sources to mine
siblings.summary: Which review platforms to scrape for a 'clear edge' Ghent restaurant guide, ranked by signal density.

sources.title: visit.gent.be — Vrijmoed
sources.claim: Vrijmoed at Vlaanderenstraat 22 holds two Michelin stars under chef Michaël Vrijmoed, trained under Peter Goossens (Hof van Cleve)

sources.title: gaultmillau.be — Ten to Taste Gent 2026
sources.claim: Gault&Millau 2026 Ten to Taste list for Gent

sources.title: guide.michelin.com — OAK
sources.claim: OAK (Burgstraat 16) is a one-Michelin-star contemporary restaurant by chef Marcelo Ballardin in a 17C edifice with 24 seats

sources.title: guide.michelin.com — Publiek
sources.claim: Publiek at Ham 39 holds one Michelin star; chef Olly Ceulenaere champions little-known vegetables

sources.title: made-in.be — Sensum gets star
sources.claim: Sensum, in a castle on the Ghent ring canal in Sint-Denijs-Westrem, was awarded its first Michelin star in 2023

sources.title: bouverne.be — Sensum
sources.claim: Sensum is run by Dutch couple Maurice de Jaeger (chef) and Deborah Hellburg (host/sommelier)

sources.title: souvenir.gent
sources.claim: Souvenir held a Michelin star and a Michelin Green Star for sustainable gastronomy

sources.title: made-in.be — Souvenir/Lubbi
sources.claim: Souvenir's Brabantdam location closed in 2025 after 11 years; team now runs bistro Lubbi in Gentbrugge

sources.title: guide.michelin.com — Hof van Cleve 2★
sources.claim: Hof van Cleve was directly awarded two Michelin stars under successor chef Floris Van Der Veken in the 2024 guide

sources.title: vrt.be — Goossens leaves Hof van Cleve
sources.claim: Peter Goossens handed Hof van Cleve to Floris Van Der Veken on 1 January 2024 after the restaurant had held three Michelin stars since 2005

sources.title: guide.michelin.com — Bar Bask
sources.claim: Bar Bask is a Michelin Bib Gourmand in Ghent built around an Asador Basque grill

sources.title: guide.michelin.com — Boris & Maurice
sources.claim: Boris & Maurice in Sint-Amandsberg is a Michelin Bib Gourmand French-inspired bistro by reservation only

sources.title: lofrestaurant.com
sources.claim: LOF Restaurant inside Pillows Hotel Reylof is a gastronomic concept tied to Dutch 3-star chef Paul de Groote

sources.title: guide.michelin.com — Roots
sources.claim: Roots in the Patershol district is Michelin-listed; chef Kim Devisschere serves bistronomic tasting menus from organic, locally sourced ingredients

sources.title: guide.michelin.com — Karel de Stoute
sources.claim: Karel de Stoute in Patershol is a Michelin selection under chef Thomas De Muynck

sources.title: guide.michelin.com — Commotie
sources.claim: Commotie in Sint-Amandsberg cooks over open fire with Japanese-inspired minimalism

sources.title: gaultmillau.be — Elders Gastro-Bistro 2025
sources.claim: Elders (Edmond Van Beverenplein 16) was named Gault&Millau Gastro-Bistro of the Year 2025

sources.title: gaultmillau.be — Le Julien
sources.claim: Le Julien (Aalter-Lotenhulle, ≈25km from Ghent) earned Gault&Millau 16/20 and 3 chef's hats

sources.title: avs.be — Le Julien Dessert of the Year
sources.claim: Le Julien won Gault&Millau Belgium 2026 'Dessert of the Year' for a Paris-Brest

sources.title: gaultmillau.be — Belux 2026 23rd edition
sources.claim: Gault&Millau Belux 2026 is the 23rd edition with 1,340+ restaurants; Karen Torosyan (Bozar, Brussels) is Chef of the Year

sources.title: gaultmillau.be — Martino H!P 2026
sources.claim: Snack bar Martino (Ghent) was crowned Gault&Millau H!P 2026 winner for Flanders

sources.title: michelin.com — Belgium & Luxembourg 2025
sources.claim: Michelin Guide Belgium & Luxembourg 2025 lists 790 restaurants of which 151 are starred

sources.title: oakgent.be
sources.claim: OAK is run by chef Marcelo Ballardin; the dining room is intimate at 24 seats

sources.title: publiekgent.be
sources.claim: Publiek's seasonal, ingredient-led menus avoid luxury products and focus on local seasonal flavours

sources.title: Wikipedia — Hof van Cleve
sources.claim: Hof van Cleve held three Michelin stars from 2005 to 2023 under Peter Goossens; the restaurant is in Kruisem

sources.title: hofvancleve.com
sources.claim: Hof van Cleve continues operating under chef-owner Floris Van Der Veken

sources.title: gaultmillau.be — Sensum
sources.claim: Gault&Millau gives Sensum a 2026 score of 15.5/20

sources.title: visit.gent.be — LOF
sources.claim: LOF Restaurant occupies the former townhouse of baron and poet Olivier de Reylof inside Pillows Hotel Reylof

sources.title: gaultmillau.be — Karel de Stoute
sources.claim: Karel de Stoute holds a Gault&Millau 2026 score of 15/20 in the Patershol

sources.title: gaultmillau.be — Commotie
sources.claim: Gault&Millau lists Commotie's cuisine as 'Creative' with Thomas Gellynck at the helm

sources.title: visit.gent.be — Bar Bask
sources.claim: Bar Bask sits in a former gas station near the Scheldt with a wood-fired Asador grill
